examples: The steep sidewalk was too narrow for them to walk abreast.
It is almost impossible to keep abreast of all the latest developments in computing.
My main reason for subscribing to New Scientist is to keep abreast of advances in science.
And solution providers are developing social links with customers to keep them abreast of technology development.
They marched in orderly ranks, three abreast, like emperor penguins in a nature film.
